# Yerick Cano — Full Stack Software Engineer
> Building software that creates real opportunities for people. Based in Costa Rica.

## About
Full Stack Software Engineer with 4 years of experience.
Specializes in: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS.
Location: Costa Rica.

## Projects
- Fuller (https://fuller.express): Delivery platform for Costa Rica's Caribbean coast. Created a new local economy where delivery didn't exist.
- SnowConvert: Enterprise SQL migration tool for Snowflake. Used worldwide to accelerate cloud data transformation.
- BusCaribe (https://buscaribe.vercel.app): Modern bus schedule app. 500 users on day one.

## Services (https://www.yerick.me/#packages)
Web development packages from $99 to $15,000+.
- Página Pro ($99): Single professional page, 24–48 hr delivery
- Digital Presence ($199–$499): Full site with Google indexing
- Business Growth ($999–$1,999): CMS + chatbot + automation
- Web Application ($2,999–$5,999): Custom app with auth, admin panel
- Platform/Marketplace ($6,999–$15,000+): Full marketplace with real-time features
